query: Validate these code-review findings before I post them.
Use $numados-verify-finding to separate true issues from false alarms.
Is this review comment actually correct against the PR diff?
Trace this suspected race and tell me whether it is real.
Check whether the pull request activates this pre-existing bug.
Verify the serializer claim in this finding using the actual configuration.
Classify each candidate as confirmed, false alarm, out of scope, or unknown.
Prove or refute this null-dereference finding.
Validate this security review hypothesis before acting on it.
Check the exact changed line for this proposed PR comment.
Review this pull request and find all bugs.
Post these already verified comments to the PR.
Fix the confirmed issue in the current branch.
Explain this finding in simpler language.
Generate a commit message for the fix.
Search for possible code smells in the repository.
Run the full test suite.
Compare the source and target branches.
Summarize existing PR comments.
Implement a regression test for this bug.
